nasb.text: Then Moses lifted up his hand and struck the rock twice with his rod; and water came forth abundantly, and the congregation and their beasts drank.

esv.text: And Moses lifted up his hand and struck the rock with his staff twice, and water came out abundantly, and the congregation drank, and their livestock.

cnv.text: 摩西舉手，用杖擊打磐石兩次，就有很多水流出來，會眾和他們的牲畜都喝了。

ccb.text: 接着，摩西举起手中的杖击打磐石两下，水便喷涌而出，会众和牲畜都喝了。
